name: obsidian-view-plus
description: Open non-Markdown files in dedicated views with syntax highlighting and system app launch.

scripts.deploy: npm run build && mkdir -p /home/dexsoft/myspace/note-gen/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-view-plus && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css /home/dexsoft/myspace/note-gen/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-view-plus/
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
